title: Automatic Translation
wikitext:
[[File:Cypher Translator Image.jpg|right|400px]]

==Summary==
'''Automatic Translation''' is the ability to understand and utilize verbal or non-verbal communication without any prior knowledge of the language.

Some characters with this ability are limited in some way, such as only translating verbal communication or text. While others can translate virtually any form of communication automatically.

The ability to listen to and talk with animals may also fall under automatic translation. Unlike [[Animal Manipulation]], this would only extend so far as being able to communicate with animals or other typically nonverbal beings as though they could talk, rather than controlling them outright. However, it should not be assumed that those who showcase this ability have the capacity to speak any language, or vice versa.

==Users==
*[[Dr. Two-Brains]] ([[WordGirl (Verse)|Wordgirl]])
*[[Drax the Destroyer (Marvel Cinematic Universe)|Drax the Destroyer]] ([[Marvel Cinematic Universe]])
*[[Naofumi Iwatani (Web Novel)|Naofumi Iwatani]] ([[The Rising of the Shield Hero]])
*[[Green Lantern Power Ring]] users ([[DC Comics]])
